'''âl-j-d''' ('''kalajad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vamous|vamous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-j-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vamous|vamous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-j-d
|-
! Lemma
| kalajad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilajad|thilajad]] || [[word:jilajad|jilajad]] || [[word:shilajad|shilajad]] || [[word:kilajad|kilajad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulajad|thuthulajad]] || [[word:jujulajad|jujulajad]] || [[word:shushulajad|shushulajad]] || [[word:kukulajad|kukulajad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulajad|thulajad]] || [[word:julajad|julajad]] || [[word:shulajad|shulajad]] || [[word:kulajad|kulajad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulajad|thulajad]] || [[word:julajad|julajad]] || [[word:shulajad|shulajad]] || [[word:kulajad|kulajad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelajad|thelajad]] || [[word:jelajad|jelajad]] || [[word:shelajad|shelajad]] || [[word:kelajad|kelajad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholajad|thotholajad]] || [[word:jojolajad|jojolajad]] || [[word:shosholajad|shosholajad]] || [[word:kokolajad|kokolajad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholajad|tholajad]] || [[word:jolajad|jolajad]] || [[word:sholajad|sholajad]] || [[word:kolajad|kolajad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholajad|tholajad]] || [[word:jolajad|jolajad]] || [[word:sholajad|sholajad]] || [[word:kolajad|kolajad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlajad|thĂŠlajad]] || [[word:jĂŠlajad|jĂŠlajad]] || [[word:shĂŠlajad|shĂŠlajad]] || [[word:kĂŠlajad|kĂŠlajad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalajad|thathalajad]] || [[word:jajalajad|jajalajad]] || [[word:shashalajad|shashalajad]] || [[word:kakalajad|kakalajad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalajad|thalajad]] || [[word:jalajad|jalajad]] || [[word:shalajad|shalajad]] || [[word:kalajad|kalajad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalajad|thalajad]] || [[word:jalajad|jalajad]] || [[word:shalajad|shalajad]] || [[word:kalajad|kalajad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalajad|shalajad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalajad|goshalajad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalajad|gokishalajad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalajadnĂŒ|shalajadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalajadnknĂŒ|goshalajadnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalajadnĂŒ|gokishalajadnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalajadshĂ«|shalajadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalajadnkshĂ«|goshalajadnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalajadshĂ«|gokishalajadshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalajadro|shalajadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalajadnkro|goshalajadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalajadro|gokishalajadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalajadmu|shalajadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalajadnkmu|goshalajadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalajadmu|gokishalajadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalajadsher|shalajadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalajadnksher|goshalajadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalajadsher|gokishalajadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalajadng|shalajadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalajadnkng|goshalajadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalajadng|gokishalajadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalajadya|shalajadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalajadnkya|goshalajadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalajadya|gokishalajadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalajadyam|shalajadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalajadnkyam|goshalajadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalajadyam|gokishalajadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalajadnĂŒshĂ«|shalajadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalajadnknĂŒshĂ«|goshalajadnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalajadnĂŒshĂ«|gokishalajadnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalajadnĂŒro|shalajadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalajadnknĂŒro|goshalajadnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalajadnĂŒro|gokishalajadnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalajadnĂŒmu|shalajadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalajadnknĂŒmu|goshalajadnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalajadnĂŒmu|gokishalajadnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalajadshĂ«nĂŒ|shalajadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalajadnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalajadnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalajadshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalajadshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalajadshĂ«ro|shalajadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalajadnkshĂ«ro|goshalajadnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalajadshĂ«ro|gokishalajadshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalajadshĂ«mu|shalajadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalajadnkshĂ«mu|goshalajadnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalajadshĂ«mu|gokishalajadshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalajadronĂŒ|shalajadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalajadnkronĂŒ|goshalajadnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalajadronĂŒ|gokishalajadronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalajadroshĂ«|shalajadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalajadnkroshĂ«|goshalajadnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalajadroshĂ«|gokishalajadroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalajadromu|shalajadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalajadnkromu|goshalajadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalajadromu|gokishalajadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalajadmunĂŒ|shalajadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalajadnkmunĂŒ|goshalajadnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalajadmunĂŒ|gokishalajadmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalajadmushĂ«|shalajadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalajadnkmushĂ«|goshalajadnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalajadmushĂ«|gokishalajadmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalajadmuro|shalajadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalajadnkmuro|goshalajadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalajadmuro|gokishalajadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
